seo.title: Repo Monkey | Manage userscripts with GitHub
seo.description: Repo Monkey is a Chrome extension that connects userscripts with a GitHub repository.

hero.title: Give your userscripts a reliable home
hero.lead: Repo Monkey brings userscripts back to GitHub. Sync, edit, toggle, and commit from the browser when your scripts are worth maintaining over time.

primaryPanel.label: Script management
primaryPanel.title: Sync from a repository and manage scripts in Chrome
primaryPanel.body: No more copying the same script between places. Repo Monkey keeps browser scripts and repository files in one practical loop.

points.two: Edit and toggle them from the extension.
points.three: Commit local changes back to GitHub.

secondaryPanel.label: Open source
secondaryPanel.title: Install from Releases today. Store listing later
secondaryPanel.body: Source code, builds, and setup notes live on GitHub so you can inspect, try, and give feedback.

features.title: Less script shuffling. More order.
features.lead: Repo Monkey does not replace GitHub or act as a script marketplace. It focuses on making userscripts easier to save, sync, and maintain.

repo.title: Repository sync
repo.body: Bring script files from GitHub into the browser and send edits back.

sync.title: Script list
sync.body: View, search, enable, and disable scripts from the popup and options page.

edit.title: Built-in editing
edit.body: Create and update scripts inside the extension with less context switching.

ship.title: Open distribution
ship.body: Download builds from GitHub Releases or inspect the source directly.

scenarios.title: For people who maintain userscripts seriously.
scenarios.lead: When scripts are more than one-off snippets, Repo Monkey helps keep them portable, shareable, and easier to revisit.

traceable.label: Scripts live where you already keep code.

clean.label: Daily actions stay in the browser.

solo.title: Personal automation
solo.body: Keep everyday scripts together instead of scattering them across devices and browser profiles.

team.title: Shared scripts
team.body: Store team scripts in one repository and let members sync from the same source.

ops.title: Internal tool tweaks
ops.body: Maintain lightweight scripts for admin pages, dashboards, and repeated tasks.

cta.title: Download the extension or inspect the source.
cta.body: The browser store link will open after publication. For now, grab a build from GitHub Releases.

footer.copy: Repo Monkey manages userscripts with GitHub.
